sourceMovie.title: 2 Guns
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto 2 Guns (2013) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Red Notice
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If 2 Guns clicked for you, Red Notice (2021) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after 2 Guns?
faq.answer: Try Red Notice, Bad Boys: Ride or Die, Defendor—each shares DNA with 2 Guns while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is 2 Guns?
faq.answer: 2 Guns (2013) is best described as Action, Comedy, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is 2 Guns worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
